.env.example.general_idea: Add configuration for a dedicated HMAC secret for OTP generation, separating it from the JWT secret for better security in production.
Update CORS allowed origins example to reflect production HTTPS usage and reference TLS documentation.
Remove hardcoded Google and Microsoft OAuth client IDs and related configuration comments from the example file.
Add configuration for a fixed OTP used specifically in CI E2E API tests to avoid email verification steps.
Add optional configuration for OpenAI API key to support RAG embeddings in the chatbot feature.
Add optional configuration for Unsplash access key and cache TTL to support hero image proxying.

Update the PostgreSQL service image from version 16 to 18 in the E2E API job.
